svg.title: Event-driven microservices flowchart
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing requests flowing from Frontend through Order, Payment, Inventory, Shipping, and Notification services, connected by message queues.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Frontend layer in this architecture')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Order Service')
sendPrompt('What is the Q.PAYMENT message queue?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Payment Service')
sendPrompt('What is the Q.INVENTORY message queue?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Inventory Service')
sendPrompt('What is the Q.SHIPPING message queue?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Shipping Service')
sendPrompt('What is the Q.NOTIFICATION message queue?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Notification Service')
